mano_cua.result_summary: 发现2个bug与PR描述一致：1)发送按钮(➤)点击无反应，多次点击均无效，消息留在输入框；2)Shift+Enter触发发送而非换行，无法在输入框中实现多行文本输入。Enter键发送正常。API报错'You haven't set the api key of openai'属预期（无后端）。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Send button click event is broken (no response on multiple clicks). Shift+Enter triggers send instead of newline. Both bugs match PR title 'fix: Send button doesn't work, input box doesn't wrap on mobile'.
